# lllm.dev

> News on local LLMs. Covering models, tools, and the open-source AI ecosystem.

## News

- [Llama 4 just dropped — and it runs on a laptop](https://lllm.dev/news/llama-4-laptop/): Meta's Llama 4 8B runs on consumer laptops. 128K context, multimodal, Apache 2.0.
- [Ollama 1.0 is here](https://lllm.dev/news/ollama-1.0/): Multi-GPU support, model caching, streaming SSE with per-token metadata.
- [MLX for text: Apple's secret weapon for local AI](https://lllm.dev/news/mlx-text/): Apple's MLX framework now has first-class text generation. 20–30% faster than llama.cpp on Apple Silicon.
- [DwarfStar 4: antirez ships a dedicated DeepSeek V4 Flash engine](https://lllm.dev/news/dwarfstar-4/): 284B MoE on a MacBook. KV cache on disk, 1M context.
- [llama.cpp gets Vulkan backend](https://lllm.dev/news/llamacpp-vulkan/): One backend for every GPU — NVIDIA, AMD, Intel, mobile.
- [llmfit: one command to find what model runs on your hardware](https://lllm.dev/news/llmfit/): Auto-detects GPU, RAM, CPU. Scores every model for your machine.

## Guides

- [Getting Started](https://lllm.dev/guides/getting-started/): Setup and first run
- [Running Models](https://lllm.dev/guides/running-models/): Configuration and optimization
- [Hardware](https://lllm.dev/guides/hardware/): GPU and system requirements
- [Fine-Tuning](https://lllm.dev/guides/fine-tuning/): Customizing models

## Pages

- [About](https://lllm.dev/about/): Project background and philosophy
- [Tools](https://lllm.dev/tools/): Curated list of local LLM tools
- [All News](https://lllm.dev/news/): Full news archive
